query:
-- 1. Current ledger state
SELECT availableCash, initialCapital FROM paperLedger WHERE userId=1;

-- 2. Open positions total
SELECT COUNT(*) as openCount, SUM(allocatedCapital) as deployedCapital FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open';

-- 3. Closed trades — total allocated IN vs total proceeds OUT
SELECT COUNT(*) as closedTrades, 
  SUM(allocatedCapital) as totalAllocatedIn,
  SUM(allocatedCapital + realizedPnl - commission) as totalProceedsOut,
  SUM(realizedPnl) as totalRealizedPnl,
  SUM(commission) as totalCommissions
FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1;

-- 4. Mathematical check: initialCapital = cash + deployed - realizedPnl + commissions?
SELECT 
  (SELECT availableCash FROM paperLedger WHERE userId=1) as cash,
  (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open') as deployed,
  (SELECT SUM(realizedPnl) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1) as realizedPnl,
  (SELECT SUM(commission) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1) as commissions;
